data.scene: User taps 'Share Location' button on Location Sharing screen during onboarding after server connection.
data.purpose: Enable location-based automations and presence detection features in Home Assistant.
data.item: Location permission grant/deny status (ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION, ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION)
data.processing: Local only; sensor enable state written to Room database (Sensor table)
data.recipient: Only the sensor enable state is sent to the Home Assistant server; permission status itself is local
data.switchpath: Onboarding flow -> Location Sharing screen -> 'Share Location' button

permissions.name: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When requesting location permission during onboarding.
permissions.purpose: Obtain precise GPS location for presence detection and geofencing automations.
permissions.impact: If denied, location-related features will be unavailable, but other app features will still work.

permissions.name: ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When requesting location permission during onboarding.
permissions.purpose: Obtain approximate location for network-based positioning during onboarding.
permissions.impact: If denied, location-related features will be unavailable, but other app features will still work.

permissions.name: ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When requesting location permission during onboarding (Android 10+).
permissions.purpose: Allow location updates when the app is in the background for continuous presence detection.
permissions.impact: If denied, background location tracking will not be available; only foreground location will work.

data.scene: User selects 'Most Secure' option during HTTP server connection setup; location permission is requested for home network detection.
data.purpose: Detect whether the device is on the home Wi-Fi network to configure a secure connection.
data.item: Location permission grant/deny status (for local network detection during onboarding)
data.frequency: Once during onboarding (only if server uses HTTP)
data.processing: Local only; denied permission causes option to revert to 'Less Secure'
data.recipient: None; permission result used only for UI flow decisions
data.switchpath: Onboarding flow -> Secure Connection screen -> 'Most Secure' radio -> Save
